name: BPLATS,Inc.
summary: BPLATS,Inc. develops and sells subscription integration tools for connecting sellers and buyers. It offers Bplats Platform Edition for constructing a flexible and organic ecosystem, which allows providers and users to freely change the position of products that are rising from the Internet of Things; and Bplats Channel Edition, which connects various stakeholders from upstream to downstream with subscription business, as well as ASP-SaaS Navi services. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.
